name: Google Drive
author: Omi Team
description: Connect to Google Drive. Automatically sync OMI Memories and/or Transcripts, Action Items, and Plugin Data to Google Drive.

name: Audio Backup
author: @salman.m
description: Save Omi capture audio to Google Drive. Omi Audio effortlessly saves audio segments to your Google Drive, capturing 30-second clips for easy organization and access.

name: Omi Mentor (deprecated)
author: Omi Team
description:
THIS APP WAS INTEGRATED INTO OMI CORE FUNCTIONALITY AND NOT UPDATED ANYMORE 

Omi mentor is listening to your conversations and sends you proactive real-time feedback and advice. it uses all “facts” that Omi knows about you and soon will use past conversations as well

external_integration.setup_instructions_file_path: No setup needed - just install the app

name: ChatGPT
author: Thinh
description: Connect your Omi with ChatGPT

name: General Summary
author: Omi Team
description: Unlock the power of concise insights with Summary Pro. Transform lengthy texts into clear, digestible summaries, enhancing your reading efficiency and comprehension. Perfect for students, professionals, and anyone seeking to save time while staying informed.

name: Conversation Summarizer
author: Simon Baars
description: Summarizes conversations into key points

name: Insight Extractor
author: QNFO
description: Extracts the highest-value content from any conversation, surfacing commitments, decisions, knowledge, requests, and key context that you'll want to remember later.

name: Lie Detector Pro
author: Damien Ietto
description: Analyzes a conversation between two or more speakers for signs of dishonesty, focusing on inconsistent statements, hesitations, over-compensation, vague responses, emotional tone, distancing language, and response times. It concludes with a percentage indicating each speaker's likelihood of deception.

name: Note to Self
author: Hitarth Sharma
description: Captures personal notes and reminders from conversations

name: Improved Transcript
author: Simon Baars
description: Infers speakers and analyzes sentiment in the transcript to improve it.

name: Latent Information Analyzer
author: QNFO
description: Identifies what you're missing in conversations - unaddressed questions, skipped topics, missed signals, and implicit assumptions. Helps you catch important details that often slip through the cracks.

name: ADHD Assistant
author: ace
description: breaks down tasks into micro to-do lists, similar to the daily action plan but for individual memories. Uses ADHD friendly planning, but will help anyone

name: #1 The Best Summarizer
author: Salman
description: #1 The Best Summarizer effortlessly condenses lengthy conversations into clear, actionable summaries. Capture key insights, action items, and the overall vibe, ensuring you never miss important details while saving time and enhancing productivity in every discussion.

name: KOL - The Girlfriend Retainer
author: Kanishak Chaurasia
description: Communication for Better Relationships♥️

name: Cognitive Bias Detector
author: AiQ8.org
description: Identifies cognitive biases and provides recommendations for more objective and rational thinking

name: Notion Data Sync
author: Joan Cabezas
description: Stores all your conversations into a notion database

name: Speech Coach
author: Sagar Saija, Minsuk Kang
description: Provides feedback on public speaking skills and suggests improvements

name: Omi Wrapped - Daily Summaries
author: Carl Kho
description: Stop losing daily insights. Omi Wrapped automatically transforms your Omi conversations into a personalized daily reflection story. Discover gratitude moments, reinforce learning, get Al mentor advice, and capture actionable tasks - all presented in an engaging visual format inspired by Spotify Wrapped. Understand your day, effortlessly.

external_integration.setup_instructions_file_path:
1. Install Omi Wrapped.

2. Use your Omi device throughout the day as usual.

3. Around your preferred reflection time (e.g., evening), open the Omi app, go to your installed apps list, and tap the "Omi Wrapped" icon.

4. This will launch your personalized Daily Reflection story via the App Home URL.. Swipe up to explore!

Note (POC): For judging/testing, the reflection currently displays data for a pre-configured user ID. Access requires the specific demo link provided. Data is processed nightly (9PM UTC).

name: Class Notes
author: Findirfin
description: Takes notes optimised for classses and lectures

name: J.A.R.V.I.S.
author: Eulices L.
description: Experience an AI companion that listens and responds when you need it. Voice-activated and context-aware, it enhances productivity by providing seamless assistance without interruptions, making it perfect for multitasking and everyday conversations.

name: OpenClaw
author: Mohsin
description: OpenClaw lets you seamlessly access and manage your OpenClaw instance via Omi, delivering secure, efficient control and real-time interaction for enhanced productivity on the go

external_integration.setup_instructions_file_path: open link and configure the app

chat_tools.name: ask_openclaw
chat_tools.description: Ask OpenClaw to perform any task on the user's local computer - search files, check calendar, read emails, browse web, run commands, and more. OpenClaw is a powerful local AI assistant with access to the user's machine.

request.description: What you want OpenClaw to do (e.g., 'find files about quarterly report', 'check if I'm free tomorrow at 5pm', 'search my emails for messages from John')

name: Omi Assist
author: David
description:
A discreet, customizable assistant via Telegram bot that reacts to your secret phrases and sends crafted messages where you need it.

Whether for safety or productivity- speak, and we'll take care of the rest

name: Brain
author: Eulices
description:
Brain is your personal AI memory assistant that transforms everyday conversations into a powerful, searchable knowledge graph.


 Every conversation, meeting, and thought is automatically processed to extract people, places, events, and concepts - creating a living, breathing map of your
 memories.


 KEY FEATURES:

🧠 Automatic Memory Extraction - Identifies and stores important entities from your conversations

🔗 Relationship Mapping - Discovers connections between people, places, and events  

🎨 3D Visualization - Explore your memories in an interactive 3D graph

💬 AI-Powered Chat - Query your memories with natural language

🖼️ Auto-Enrichment - Memories enhanced with images and descriptions

📊 Memory Analytics - Understand patterns in your interactions


Perfect for:

 • Remembering important details from meetings
 • Tracking relationships and networking
 • Building your personal knowledge base
 • Never forgetting meaningful conversations

Your second brain that never forgets.

name: Bitcoin Live
author: @salman.m
description: Just say “Bitcoin Pirce” to get the latest price. Powered by CoinGecko.

name: Steve Jobs
author: Tristan L
description: Personality of Steve Jobs. Get visionary, design-focused advice to help you pursue excellence, innovation, and simplicity.

name: Agreements, Commitments & Conclusions reached.
author: Renan
description: Highlight a list of relevant agreements, commitments, or conclusions reached.

name: Therapist Patient Notes
author: Akshay Narisetti
description: Structured Psychotherapy Session Notes

name: Reasoner Friend
author: guilhermeke
description: Friendly AI companion that helps users think through decisions, ideas, or challenges with a warm and thoughtful tone.

name: NVC Communication Analyzer
author: @nathansudds
description: Analyze conversations to detect Non-Violent Communication (NVC) principles, provide ratings, insights, and suggestions for improving communication.

name: Prompt Engineer - MiniMax
author: Aleks Daydreamer
description:
This micro app will help you craft a prompt for GPT chat bot, to optimally and effectively use it's capabilities. Instead of engineering an advanced prompt yourself, let the Omi AI do it. Tell it what is the goal you want to achieve using GPT chatbot (external) and receive a prompt for this purpose.

MiniMax is a brand of micro apps in Omi environment. Each app is set to work as one of my (Aleks Daydreamer) own advanced GPT functionalities. Max is my personal GPT based on GPT-4o by OpenAI, trained for last 10 months to serve as my work and home assistant.

name: Automatic Dictionary
author: Dennis Muensterer
description: Get definitions for complicated words

name: Networking Guru
author: Shrey Birmiwal
description: Networking Guru helps users excel at professional and social networking. It provides follow-up strategies, remembers key personal details, and suggests ways to strengthen connections.

name: Music Identifier
author: Finley
description: This app identifies song lyrics from the transcript and then accurately finds the song and gives the artist and album. Plus, information on where you heard the song at like "At the restaurant" or "At the park".

name: Unspoken Links
author: Mohsin
description: This app analyzes conversation transcripts to uncover unspoken implications, contextual gaps, and overlooked connections. By identifying assumptions, underexplored topics, and unresolved questions, it generates insightful follow-up questions to encourage deeper discussions and enhance understanding of the subject matter.

name: EchoSense
author: Luis Arano
description: Analyzes the emotional tone and communication quality of a transcribed conversation. It identifies the speaker's emotional state, offers constructive feedback on their communication style, and encourages reflection on how their words might have been perceived. The goal is to help users connect more deeply with their emotions and improve their communication skills.

name: Map Notes
author: Blockchain at Berkeley
description: Drop notes as pins on the world around you by saying 'start map note' or 'clip this', your note, then 'end map note' or 'clip that'.

name: Topic Identifier
author: Simon Baars
description: Identifies the different topics in a conversation and summarizes them

name: Mental Health Friend
author: Infuzu.com
description: A supportive friend that monitors your mental health and provides recommendations to improve it based on your conversations.

name: Storytelling Mentor
author: ASSH
description: The Storytelling Mentor is a chat prompt designed to refine your storytelling craft. Whether you’re crafting a novel, speech, or presentation, it offers personalized expert guidance to shape your narrative. The tool tailors its advice to your unique style and medium, focusing on key elements such as structure, pacing, character development, and emotional resonance. With practical strategies, it helps you engage your audience and enhance your message, ensuring your storytelling leaves a lasting impact.

name: Advanced Fact Checker
author: Brady Anthony-Brumfield
description: Searches the web and provides additional reading for contentious statements

name: Better Communicator
author: Hitarth Sharma
description: Analyzes conversations to provide feedback on speaking clarity, effectiveness, and overall communication skills.

name: Marcus Aurelius
author: Kaito
description: Stoic, philosopher, wise, disciplined, concise, dignified

name: Omira
author: Ritesh Hiremath
description: Unlock the future of well-being with Omira! Our innovative app harnesses the power of AI to track your health, analyze conversations, and provide personalized insights tailored just for you. Seamlessly connect your memories and experiences to enhance your daily life, making every interaction meaningful. Whether you're looking to improve your nutrition, manage stress, or simply stay organized, Omira is here to guide you on your journey to a healthier, happier you.

external_integration.setup_instructions_file_path: Sign up using the below link to get started

name: Smart Mentor
author: Soham
description: Omi Mentor enhances your Omi app with real-time transcription and smart responses. It captures live transcriptions, processes them on a backend server using an advanced language model, and summarizes the content with Transformers. Summarized responses are sent as notifications to the Omi app. You can also manage transcriptions, create tasks, and track events like meetings or classes, all stored securely.

name: Social Lens
author: Comfortta
description: Wonder what vibes you gave off or how others are interpreting your spoken words? I can analyze your mood and inform you how others may have perceived you.

name: Superconnector
author: Shubh
description:
connect to your intellectual soulmates
interfaces with
superconnector.network

say “connect” and the type of person you want to meet and the name of the network

external_integration.setup_instructions_file_path: enter your phone number to create a superconnector account!

name: Civilized Conversations
author: Jeddy
description: Civilized conversation app empowers healthy communication by monitoring conversations in real-time to detect subtle negative language that could harm confidence or lead to conflicts. With proactive feedback and helpful suggestions, the app helps users foster a respectful and constructive communication environment.

name: Confidence Booster
author: Tristan L
description: Confidence Booster points out your best moments, building you up with supportive tips to keep your confidence strong.

name: Lifeagotchi
author: Vincent Koc
description: Advanced life RPG system with deep progression mechanics, skill trees, and dynamic stat tracking. Level up your actual life with game-like precision!

name: Meeting Notes
author: Forest
description: Never miss a detail again! From team meetings to HOA discussions, this app seamlessly captures attendees, topics, decisions, and action items. Simply say “Start meeting notes,” or something along those lines, and when you’re done, close with “Meeting adjourned” or similar. Organized, clear, and always ready—your meetings have never been this productive.
